description: Stop tracking a file in Git without deleting it from disk
tags: remove from git but keep file
intents: i accidentally committed a file i shouldnt have
i accidentally committed my secrets file and want to untrack it
i committed a .env or credentials file by mistake
stop git from tracking this file but keep it on disk
remove a file from version control but not delete it from my machine
untrack a config file like .env without rewriting history
i added something to gitignore but it is still being tracked
i pushed passwords or api keys and need git to forget the file
